content.body: @pchimento:igalia.com At the last plenary, you asked for a roadmap of the iterator built-ins. I put together this roadmap based on in-progress proposals and what's currently on my radar: https://gist.github.com/michaelficarra/34c47e1161b9ba2526ee197e1f5cb624
